_about: PROTECTED default VTOL powertrain — snapshot of gokce_flight16. Battery/motor/prop fields marked 'stored' are catalogue placeholders for the future power model (not yet consumed by the physics) — replace with test-stand data when available.

_doc.pwm_min: Minimum PWM signal sent to motors in microseconds. Must match Q_M_PWM_MIN in params.parm.
_doc.pwm_max: Maximum PWM signal sent to motors in microseconds. Must match Q_M_PWM_MAX in params.parm.
_doc.k_thrust: Lift motor thrust coefficient in Newtons: T = k_thrust * throttle². Derive through AP's FULL output path (expo + spin window) from Q_M_THST_HOVER — see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
_doc.k_torque: Lift motor reaction torque coefficient: Q = k_torque * throttle². Sets yaw authority in hover.
_doc.k_thrust_pusher: Pusher motor thrust coefficient in Newtons: T = k_thrust_pusher * throttle². Static-thrust value; no prop-unloading model yet.
_doc.motor_time_constant_s: First-order lag time constant for motor thrust response, seconds. Real brushless motors take 30–50 ms to slew thrust.
_doc.rotational_damping: Rotational damping coefficient in N·m/(rad/s), all three axes. Hover PIDs rely on it.
_doc.drag_coeff: Hover heave (rotor-inflow) damping, BODY Z ONLY, N/(m/s), faded out over the hover_drag_fade band.
_doc.drag_coeff_hover_xy: Mild hover translational damping on body X/Y, N/(m/s), faded with the same band.
_doc.drag_coeff_forward: Always-on isotropic parasite residual drag, N/(m/s); wing CD0 covers the rest above stall.
_doc.hover_drag_fade_lo_ms: Airspeed (m/s) below which the full hover drag coefficients apply.
_doc.hover_drag_fade_hi_ms: Airspeed (m/s) above which only drag_coeff_forward remains.
_doc.servo_speed_deg_s: Control-surface servo slew rate, deg/s. STORED for the future servo-lag model — not yet consumed.
_doc.battery_cells_s: Battery cell count in series (S). Stored for the future battery/endurance model.
_doc.battery_capacity_mah: Battery capacity in mAh. Stored — placeholder estimate, not measured.
_doc.battery_voltage_full_v: Fully charged pack voltage (4.2 V/cell). Stored.
_doc.battery_internal_resistance_ohm: Total pack internal resistance in ohms (sag model). Stored.
_doc.hover_current_a: Total current draw in steady hover, A. Stored — fill from logs/test stand.
_doc.motor_kv: Lift motor KV rating (RPM/V). T-Motor P60 KV170. Stored.
_doc.motor_max_current_a: Lift motor maximum continuous current, A. Stored.
_doc.esc_max_current_a: Lift ESC continuous current rating, A. Stored.
_doc.prop_diameter_in: Lift propeller diameter in inches (Falcon CF 22x6.6). Stored.
_doc.prop_pitch_in: Lift propeller pitch in inches. Stored.
_doc.pusher_motor_kv: Pusher motor KV rating (T-Motor AT5220-A 25KV class). Stored.
_doc.pusher_prop_diameter_in: Pusher propeller diameter, inches. Stored — fill from the MISSING_ELECTRICAL_DATA request.

_k_thrust_doc: Derived through AP's full output path with the REAL 22-may Q_M_THST_HOVER 0.3488028: a=0.5112 (expo 0.65) -> u=0.15+0.8a=0.5590 -> kT=(10*9.81/4)/0.5590²=78.49 N. TWR at full demand 2.89:1.
_k_torque_doc: Physical estimate for Falcon CF 22x6.6: Q/T ≈ 0.025 m -> k_torque = 78.49 × 0.025 ≈ 2.0. Replace with test-stand torque data when available.
_k_thrust_pusher_doc: AT5220-A datasheet max thrust 7516 g = 73.7 N at full throttle. Static-thrust coefficient; no prop-unloading model.
